name: tiptop
readme_summary: Tiptop is a command-line system monitoring tool written in Python, inspired by 'top'. It provides real-time system statistics and visualizes them using graphs, working across all operating systems. It leverages Textual for its interface and psutil for data retrieval.
primary_use_case: Monitoring system resource usage and performance from the command line.
cover_image_prompt: A stylized, minimalist dashboard displaying a vibrant, animated graph of a beating heart's rhythm, symbolizing system health. Below the graph, subtle, glowing lines of code flow into a small, transparent terminal window labeled 'tiptop'. The background is a dark, abstract representation of a computer's internal circuitry, with soft, ethereal light emanating from the dashboard. The overall mood is one of calm, efficient oversight. The art style should be a clean, modern 3D isometric illustration with a focus on clear data visualization and a futuristic aesthetic.

name: SAM3-UNet
readme_summary: SAM3-UNet is a simplified adaptation of the Segment Anything Model 3 (SAM3) designed for efficient fine-tuning on downstream tasks. It combines a SAM3 image encoder with a parameter-efficient adapter and a lightweight U-Net decoder, achieving competitive performance with significantly reduced GPU memory requirements.
key_features: Outperforms prior methods on tasks like mirror and salient object detection
primary_use_case: Adapting large foundation models like SAM3 for specific image segmentation tasks with minimal computational resources.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled artisan carefully sculpting a detailed statue from a large, unrefined block of marble. The artisan uses a specialized, compact set of tools (representing the lightweight decoder and adapter) to precisely carve out specific features of the statue (representing segmented objects). The unrefined marble block is vast and complex (representing the original SAM3 model's capabilities), but the artisan's focused work efficiently reveals the desired form. Subtle digital particles and glowing lines emanate from the tools, hinting at the underlying AI technology. The repository name 'SAM3-UNet' is subtly etched onto one of the artisan's tools. The scene is set in a bright, modern workshop with a clean, focused composition. 3D isometric illustration style with clear outlines and a balanced color palette.

name: oc-claw
description: A desktop pet that monitors your AI coding agents (OpenClaw, Claude Code, Codex, Cursor) in real time. OC = OpenClaw. OC = Original Character. Make it yours.
readme_summary: OC-Claw is a desktop application that acts as a virtual pet to monitor the real-time activity of AI coding agents like OpenClaw, Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor. It provides visual feedback through character animations and offers detailed session information, chat history, and usage metrics.
key_features: Real-time monitoring of AI coding agent activity
Desktop pet character with animations based on agent status
Live session viewing for Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor
SSH connectivity to remote OpenClaw instances
Sound effects for completion and waiting states
primary_use_case: To provide a visually engaging and informative desktop companion that keeps users updated on the status and activity of their AI coding assistants.
cover_image_prompt: A whimsical, friendly desktop pet character with large, expressive eyes, perched on a stylized computer monitor. The pet is actively 'watching' several small, glowing icons representing AI coding agents (OpenClaw, Claude Code, Codex, Cursor) that are actively working, indicated by subtle digital energy flowing from them towards the pet. One icon is shown sleeping peacefully. In the background, a small, transparent overlay displays a simplified chat log and a chart showing daily token usage. The overall scene is clean and modern, with soft, ambient lighting, conveying a sense of helpful companionship and real-time awareness. The art style is a vibrant 3D isometric illustration with smooth textures and clear, friendly character design, subtly incorporating the 'OC-Claw' name on a small digital badge near the pet.

name: datatui
readme_summary: DataTUI is a fast, keyboard-first terminal UI application built with Rust and Ratatui for exploring various data formats. It supports CSV/TSV, Excel, and SQLite, offering features like tabbed views, sorting, filtering, and SQL querying via Polars.
key_features: Tabbed data views with quick navigation
Polars-backed SQL queries and lazy evaluation
Find, Find All, and value viewer
primary_use_case: Exploring and manipulating data directly within the terminal environment using a keyboard-first interface.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled cartographer in a cozy, dimly lit study, meticulously drawing a detailed map on a large parchment. Instead of traditional ink, they use a glowing digital stylus that pulls data streams from various sources (represented by small, stylized icons of spreadsheets, databases, and text files) and weaves them into the map's intricate pathways and labels. The map itself is a complex, yet organized, visualization of interconnected data points. Subtle UI elements resembling terminal windows are visible on a nearby desk, displaying DataTUI's name and a few keybindings. The overall mood is one of focused exploration and discovery in a digital frontier. 3D isometric illustration style, warm ambient lighting, rich textures.

name: BlogBowl
description: Open-source plug-and-play blogging platform. Launch SEO-friendly blogs, changelogs, and write newsletters without coding. 🔥
readme_summary: BlogBowl is an open-source, self-hosted blogging platform that allows users to quickly launch SEO-optimized blogs, product changelogs, and help documentation without coding. It features a Notion-like editor, built-in newsletter support with Postmark integration, and custom domain capabilities.
key_features: Launch a full-featured blog or help center in minutes
Built-in newsletter support with Postmark integration
primary_use_case: Enabling users to easily create and manage blogs, changelogs, and help documentation without requiring any coding knowledge.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, stylized 'bowl' overflowing with vibrant digital content like blog posts, news articles, and documentation pages. The bowl is sitting on a clean, modern desk next to a laptop displaying a simple website interface. Subtle glowing lines connect the bowl to the laptop, symbolizing the seamless transfer of content. Small, stylized icons representing SEO, speed, and ease-of-use float around the scene. The overall mood is welcoming and efficient, with a bright, clean aesthetic. The art style should be a 3D isometric illustration with soft shadows and a clear focus on the central metaphor.

name: squirreldisk
description: Beautiful, Cross-Platform and Super Fast Disk Usage Analysis Tool - Built With Rust 🦀
readme_summary: SquirrelDisk is a cross-platform desktop application built with Rust and React (Tauri) for analyzing disk usage. It helps users quickly identify large files and folders consuming hard drive space, offering a visual representation of disk utilization through a sunburst chart.
key_features: Fast scan and deep directory scanning
Disk scanning or pick a directory
Sunburst chart for disk usage visualization
Drag and drop for collecting items to delete
primary_use_case: Identifying and visualizing large files and directories to free up disk space.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, anthropomorphic squirrel diligently sorting and organizing a vast, overflowing treasure hoard of digital data blocks. Some blocks are massive and brightly colored, representing large files, while others are small and dull. The squirrel is using a magnifying glass to inspect the largest blocks, placing them into a designated 'to be cleared' pile. In the background, a stylized, glowing sunburst chart visually represents the distribution of the hoard's size. Subtle UI elements and data particles float around the squirrel, hinting at a software interface. The scene is set in a clean, modern digital environment with a bright, clear color palette. The style should be a whimsical 3D isometric illustration, emphasizing clarity and ease of understanding.
